name: Matcha Kimono Tea Ceremony (Shinjuku)
editor_note: Easy access from Shinjuku, with matcha and wagashi in a relaxed session. Tables and cushions rather than tatami make it comfortable for visitors unused to floor seating.
price_note: ¥9,000 and up per person, confirmed by Ayaka July 2026 (corrected from an earlier USD-estimate figure).
